title: "Remote not working in Mythtv"

forum: Mythbuntu

### Post by Morffinator on 2012-11-08
I've just been setting up a HTPC and I have the MCE remote working in XBMC but it won't work in Mythtv.

I have a lircrc file in the mythtv folder which is:
```

# LIRCRC Auto Generated by Mythbuntu Lirc Generator
# Author(s): Mario Limonciello, Nick Fox
```

---

### Post by BicyclerBoy on 2012-11-09
So that lircrc file is in the .mythtv folder in the frontend users home folder ?
i.e. /home/mythtv/.mythtv/ 
(assumes frontend user is mythtv)

You have enabled listening to lirc control in frontend setup?

---

### Post by Morffinator on 2012-11-09
> **BicyclerBoy said:**
> So that lircrc file is in the .mythtv folder in the frontend users home folder ?
i.e. /home/mythtv/.mythtv/ 
(assumes frontend user is mythtv)

Yep is in my home folder /home/media/.mythtv
> 
You have enabled listening to lirc control in frontend setup?
If you mean under the general setup and then under remote control then yes I do. I have:

LIRC daemon socket: /dev/lircd

Enable Network Remote Control Interface: Ticked

Network Remote Control port: 6546

UDP notify port: 6948

---

### Post by BicyclerBoy on 2012-11-09
My lirc daemon socket is
/var/run/lirc/lircd
I believe this location has moved between the above & your value.. 

(ubu 10.04 2.6.32-45 & mythtv0.25+fixes+ lirc 0.8.6)
